the request and returns a response back to the client.

III.III.I  Architecture
Dipamkara’s architecture is centered around several core com
lation. These components include:
• A document storage system that caches documents for
• An inverted index for efficient querying of documents b
• A vector storage system that maps vectors to documen
• An auto-increment mechanism for assigning unique IDs
• Asynchronous saving capabilities to ensure data persist
